known_issues: Share screen displays 'Settings' title instead of 'Share'

existing_features.title: In the TimerVisibilityBar settings dialog, when the user navigates to the 'Share' tab, the dialog title must display 'Share' instead of 'Settings'. The dialog title and subtitle should update to reflect the currently active tab — specifically, the Share tab should show a title of 'Share' (and an appropriate subtitle) rather than the generic 'Settings' heading.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix share screen title showing 'Settings' instead of 'Share'

projectName: Fix share dialog title showing 'Settings' instead of 'Share'
